verdict: Unplayable hold overlaps (triples and quads) ruin an otherwise decent medium chart.

issues.problem: Four concurrent holds (D, U, L, R) create an impossible quad hold that cannot be executed on a standard dance pad.
Triple hold (U, D, R) requires pressing three panels simultaneously, which is inappropriate for a Medium single chart.
Triple hold (U, D, L) forces a three-panel hold.
Triple hold (D, R, L) forces another three-panel hold.
While holding D and L, a tap R is required, which requires three feet or awkward bracketing.
